description: Render each PDF page to a downscaled PNG (max 1000px on the long edge, 200 dpi) for visual inspection. Wraps pdf2image (poppler).
rules: a render_images.txt manifest lists every saved page (the contract output)
needs pdf2image + the poppler binaries at runtime; absent -> manifest note + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf). Outputs: pages/page_N.png images + render_images.txt manifest.
limitation: Rasterizes only — no text layer. Requires pdf2image and poppler (pdftoppm) on PATH.
